topic: The composer audit: 6 things to fix before you pitch
hook: Before you send your next sync pitch, run this audit.
cta: Run this today. Fix the gaps before the brief lands.
caption_hook: Before you send your next sync pitch, run this audit. ↓
caption_full:
Before you send your next sync pitch, run this audit. ↓

Most composers who fail at the brief stage don't fail on music quality.

Run this today. Fix the gaps before the brief lands.

#SyncMaster #AfricanComposers #MusicBusiness #SyncAudit

slides.headline: Before you send your next sync pitch, run this audit.

slides.body: Most composers who fail at the brief stage don't fail on music quality. Supervisors give the placement to whoever responds first with the right track.
They fail on one of these 6 things. ↓ Not the best track. The right track, first. Audit now. Fix the gaps before the brief lands.

/ RIGHTS CHAIN DOCUMENTATION
Can you confirm in writing who owns the master and who controls publishing?
Not "probably me." Confirmed and documented.

/ SAMPLE CLEARANCE
Does every track you're pitching use 100% original material?
One uncleared sample in your best track = that track is unplaceable.

/ FILE QUALITY
Do you have broadcast-spec WAV files for every track you're pitching?
Not 320k MP3. Not a Spotify link.
Ready to send today.

slides.headline: Open briefs. Every Tuesday.
slides.body: Composers: apply once, get matched for life. Supervisors: shortlist in 48h.
